label: [NodeDev] install,publish,push
info: ::: aim Provide a backbone for the development nodes within Node-RED. ::: ::: requirements - [nodedev node package](https://flows.nodered.org/node/@gregoriusrippenstein/node-red-contrib-nodedev) - the [holistic JSON schema validator](https://flows.nodered.org/node/@gregoriusrippenstein/node-red-contrib-validation-and-documentation) - For GitHub commits, the repository has to be created and one commit needs to have been done. - GITHUB_TOKEN set in the env, details described in the [GitHub Base functionality](https://flowhub.org/f/390ee0021ded4910) - For NPM publish, there needs to be an env variable `NPM_AUTH_TOKEN` that needs to be defined. - For NPM publish, authentication is assumed to be OTP (one time password) and the OTP has to be entered, the flow deployed and then the button pressed. So an OTP with longer expiry might be good. ::: ::: background This flow provides the following functionality: - Local installation of node code developed using the [nodedev](https://flows.nodered.org/node/@gregoriusrippenstein/node-red-contrib-nodedev) node package - GitHub commit functionality so that all package files are committed in the correct repo structure. - NPM Publish to bring the node package to market, and - NPM Unpublish in cases of mistakes. Validation of the `msg` object and example of required properties are also provided. ::: ### Assumption That the package name is scoped with a username, i.e. `@username/node-red-contrib-XYZ`. The registry to publish to is assumed to be `https://registry.npmjs.org`. Also some requirements as defined in the [creating your own node](https://nodered.org/docs/creating-nodes/packaging) have been enforced by the package validation node. ::: discussion If I want to extend my Emacs, I don't open Vi to create my extensions, I do this in Emacs. I extend Emacs *with* Emacs. Why should this be any different in Node-RED? This flow is part of demonstrating how that idea *could* work in Node-RED. ::: ### Related flows - [nodedev node package development](https://flowhub.org/f/b92be5062203ff69) ### Usage examples - [Neural-Network Builder](https://flowhub.org/f/f7e009091ef2d6b0) - [JSON Schema Validation + Documentation](https://flowhub.org/f/a7a81bcd7159a826) - [Introspection package](https://flowhub.org/f/d73d76db3df96ba2) - [FlowHub nodes](https://flowhub.org/f/4a831589774ecb04)

**minimum number of items**: the minimum number of items for this array is: `3`

# Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow. Definitions

## Definitions group content

Reference this group by using

```json
{"$ref":"docid#/$defs/content"}
```

| Property                | Type     | Required | Nullable       | Defined by                                                                                                                                               |
| :---------------------- | :------- | :------- | :------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [name](#name)           | `string` | Required | cannot be null | [Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow.](definition-defs-content-properties-name.md "docid#/$defs/content/properties/name")         |
| [contents](#contents-1) | `string` | Required | cannot be null | [Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow.](definition-defs-content-properties-contents.md "docid#/$defs/content/properties/contents") |
| [type](#type)           | `string` | Optional | cannot be null | [Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow.](definition-defs-content-properties-type.md "docid#/$defs/content/properties/type")         |

### name

Name of the file to be included in the package.

`name`

*   is required

*   Type: `string`

*   cannot be null

*   defined in: [Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow.](definition-defs-content-properties-name.md "docid#/$defs/content/properties/name")

#### name Type

`string`

### contents

Contents of the file to be included in the package. Binary data should be encoded in base64.

`contents`

*   is required

*   Type: `string`

*   cannot be null

*   defined in: [Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow.](definition-defs-content-properties-contents.md "docid#/$defs/content/properties/contents")

#### contents Type

`string`

### type

Value describes the type of the content, default is utf-8.

`type`

*   is optional

*   Type: `string`

*   cannot be null

*   defined in: [Basic requirements for \`msg\` object to utilise this flow.](definition-defs-content-properties-type.md "docid#/$defs/content/properties/type")

#### type Type

`string`

#### type Constraints

**enum**: the value of this property must be equal to one of the following values:

| Value          | Explanation |
| :------------- | :---------- |
| `"text"`       |             |
| `"utf-8"`      |             |
| `"html"`       |             |
| `"javascript"` |             |
| `"typescript"` |             |
| `"markdown"`   |             |
| `"json"`       |             |
| `"base64"`     |             |
| `"yaml"`       |             |
| `"css"`        |             |
| `"xml"`        |             |

name: generate control center
clientcode:
let examplePackageJson = {
    "id": "c8fc2feb38924f0a",
    "type": "PkgFile",
    "z": "d0506e991d512ace",
    "name": "package.json",
    "filename": "package.json",
    "format": "json",
    "syntax": "mustache",
    "template": "{\n  \"name\" : \"{{{ pname }}}\",\n  \"version\": \"{{{ pversion }}}\",\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"is-utf8\": \"0.2.1\"\n  },\n\n  \"description\": \"{{{ pdescription }}}\",\n  \"keywords\": [\n    \"node-red\"\n  ],\n\n  \"license\": \"Don't do evil.\",\n  \"homepage\": \"https://github.com/{{ githubowner }}/{{ githubrepo }}#readme\",\n  \"author\": \"{{{ pauthorname }}} <{{{ pauthoremail }}}>\",\n  \"engines\": {\n    \"node\": \">=14\"\n  },\n\n  \"node-red\" : {\n    \"version\": \">=3.0.0\",\n    \"nodes\": {\n       \"execwithpipe\": \"nodes/execwithpipe.js\"\n    }\n  },\n\n  \"repository\": {\n    \"type\": \"git\",\n    \"url\": \"https://github.com/{{ githubowner }}/{{ githubrepo }}.git\"\n  },\n  \"bugs\": {\n    \"url\": \"https://github.com/{{ githubowner }}/{{ githubrepo }}\"\n  }\n}\n",
    "output": "str",
    "x": 1300,
    "y": 450,
    "wires": [
        ["d661356ef69e3ddb"]
    ]
}

let linkToFlow = 
    {
        "id": "d661356ef69e3ddb",
        "type": "link out",
        "z": "d0506e991d512ace",
        "name": "link out 20",
        "mode": "link",
        "links": [
            "963dfb765b0d9849"
        ],
        "x": 1384,
        "y": 598,
        "wires": []
    }


msg.payload.push(examplePackageJson)
msg.payload.push(linkToFlow)

RED.view.importNodes(msg.payload, {generateIds: true, addFlow: false })

name: create_control_center
info: This is here because gitcommit is also set to true but we don't want to generate a git commit - so stop here if the control center flow should be created.
